# Bistro Cloud

> Bistro Cloud is a fresh food delivery service based in El Gouna, Egypt. We prepare 100% natural international meals daily and deliver them across El Gouna. Located in the West Golf, New Sabina area. Open daily 10:00-20:00.

## About
- [About Bistro Cloud](https://bistro-cloud.com/about): Local food delivery service in El Gouna, Red Sea Governorate, Egypt. Fresh, natural, international cuisine made daily.

## Menu
- [Full Menu](https://bistro-cloud.com/menu): International dishes prepared fresh daily and available for delivery across El Gouna. Price range EGP 400-700 per person.

## Ordering
- [Order Online](https://bistro-cloud.com): Place an order for delivery in El Gouna via our website or WhatsApp.

## Contact
- Phone: +201221288804
- Address: West Golf, New Sabina, El Gouna, Red Sea Governorate, Egypt
- Hours: Daily 10:00-20:00

## Service Area
El Gouna, Red Sea Governorate, Egypt
